name: 基础测试 - 访问百度首页
command: python3 -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p = sync_playwright().start(); browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True); page = browser.new_page(); page.goto('https://www.baidu.com', timeout=30000); print(f'标题: {page.title()}'); print(f'URL: {page.url}'); browser.close(); p.stop()"
expected: 应该输出百度首页标题和 URL

name: 搜索测试 - 搜索关键词
command: python3 -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p = sync_playwright().start(); b = p.chromium.launch(headless=True); pg = b.new_page(); pg.goto('https://www.baidu.com'); pg.fill('#kw', 'Playwright'); pg.click('#su'); pg.wait_for_timeout(2000); print('搜索完成:', pg.url); b.close(); p.stop()"
expected: 应该输出搜索结果页 URL

name: 截图测试 - 保存页面截图
command: python3 -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; import os; p = sync_playwright().start(); browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True); page = browser.new_page(); page.goto('https://www.bilibili.com', timeout=30000); page.screenshot(path='/workspace/bilibili.png'); size = os.path.getsize('/workspace/bilibili.png'); print(f'截图已保存: bilibili.png ({size} bytes)'); browser.close(); p.stop()"
expected: 应该保存截图文件并输出文件大小
